focalElement: poised centaur warrior with solid earth-red-brown coat, tawny golden-brown mane, bull-horned head, single bronze longsword held diagonally across the body in a forward-leaning guard stance
secondaryElement: warm amber and sunset-rose glass panels with soft golden-pink gradient rays radiating outward, warm directional lighting from upper right
notes: Tier-2 colosseum boss surface — LIGHTER counterpart to silver-chimera per the stat-ordering invariant (Adaptive 2 vs 3; gildedCage.ts:127-144)

Leather + brass-scale armor (vs silver-chimera's chrome plate) signals the lighter armor tier
Poised guard stance, weight on rear hooves, ready-to-spring (vs silver-chimera's mid-charge with greatsword raised overhead)
Warm amber + sunset-rose glass with radial-halo segmentation (vs silver-chimera's cool-cobalt + indigo with broken-spires jagged shards) — distinct backdrop family signaling the lighter tier
